name: 冒牌千金被揭穿
description: 假扮塔格利安千金的女反派在公爵面前原形畢露，被判處流放北極十年。觀眾對冒牌貨竊取女主身份的憤怒在此刻完全釋放。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: And you, I graciously chose to sponsor you. Yet, you pose as my daughter. I can't believe it. / Duke Targaryen, please, please spare me. / She should be sent to the North Pole for 10 years.
